name: folio'25
about: A minimally designed portfolio showcasing my work through a monochrome theme, emphasizing simplicity and visual consistency.

name: folio'26
about: Portfolio site designed to present projects, currently under development.

name: ByteMe
about: Turn your photos into pure text magic.

name: REVA Rift
about: REVA Rift, a multi-domain tech fest website

name: prompt2vote
about: Prompt2Vote is an interactive AI-powered guide to help users understand and navigate the voting process, developed as part of PromptWars.

name: BallBack!
about: BallBack! is a hyper-casual 2D endless arcade game where players control a floating ball in an infinite sky filled with obstacles and collectibles. The game focuses on skill-based gameplay, smooth controls, and high replayability.

name: GDG Community Design & Identity
about: A community design showcasing  a cohesive visual identity of Google Developer Groups On Campus REVA University.

name: Quick Air
about: QuickAir is an AI-powered resume builder than lets users create personalized resumes through a simple chat with an intelligent assistant, making resume writing easy and accessible for everyone.

name: OXO Redesign
about: OXO Redesign is a modern take on the classic tic-tac-toe game, featuring a sleek interface and enhanced gameplay mechanics.
